hero.badge: Yi sirhelela mindyangu ya Afrika Dzonga · Mahala ku sungula
hero.headline: N'wana wena u sirhelekile inthanetini. Hi tiyisile sweswo.
hero.subheadline: Ntsena pulatifomu ya vuhlayiseki ya digirhali leyi akiwelaka mindyangu ya Afrika Dzonga. Yi languta WhatsApp. Yi vulavula Xizulu. Yi lulamile hi timinete ta 5.
hero.trust: Yi fambelana na POPIA · A ku na kharati ya xikweletu leyi lavekaka · Khansela nkarhi wun'wana na wun'wana

trust.internetUsers: Vatirhisi va inthanete va Afrika Dzonga

problem.title: Switirhisiwa hinkwaswo swa vuhlayiseki swa misava swi akeriwe vona. Ku nga ri wena.
problem.p1: N'wana wena u hanya eka WhatsApp. Eka iMessage eka nene. Eka Snapchat eka nene.
problem.p2: Bark yi durha R260 hi n'hweti naswona a yi languteli WhatsApp. Qustodio a yi vulavuli Xibunu. Google Family Link yi nga tluliwa hi timinete ta 30.
problem.p3: SafeNet SA yi akeriwe Soweto, Stellenbosch, Polokwane, na mindyangu hinkwayo leyi exikarhi.

howItWorks.label: SafeNet SA Yi Tirha Ku yini
howItWorks.headline: Yi lulamisa hi timinete ta 5. Vuhlayiseki lebyi hlalaka.
howItWorks.step1: Lawula mi nghena hi nomboro ya wena ya SA. A ku na phasiwedi leyi lavekaka.
howItWorks.step2: Skena khodi ya QR eka riqingho ra n'wana wena. Timinete ta 60.
howItWorks.step3: Luna AI yi langutela hi ku hatlisa. Swihlelo hi ririmi ra wena.

features.headline: Hinkwaswo leswi mutswari wa Afrika Dzonga a swi lavaka
features.whatsapp: Ku langutela WhatsApp. Eka xitirhisiwa xa n'wana wena. Xihlayisi.
features.whatsappDesc: Ntsena pulatifomu leyi twisisaka vukheti bya WhatsApp hi Xizulu, Xibunu, Xisuthu na Xitsonga. A swi na n'okisiwa. Swi sirhelekile eka POPIA.

testimonials.headline: Yi tshembiwa hi mindyangu ya Afrika Dzonga

cta.headline: 3.2 wa timiliyoni ta mindyangu ya Afrika Dzonga yi swi lava. Wa wena i wun'wana wa yona.
cta.sub: Sungula ku sirhelela ndyangu wa wena namuntlha. Mahala ku ringeta. Yi fambelana na POPIA. Yi lulamile hi timinete ta 5.

footer.description: Nkoka wa vuhlayiseki bya digirhali bya mindyangu ya Afrika Dzonga. Yi velekiwe laha. Yi akiwe laha.

auth.phonePrompt: Nghenisa nomboro ya wena ya riqingho ya Afrika Dzonga ku sungula
auth.phoneHint: Hi ta ku rhumela khodi ya vumbonisi yi n'we
auth.verifyHint: Nghenisa khodi ya tinomboro ta 6 leyi rhumeriweke eka +27
auth.consentDesc: Ehansi ka Nawu wa Vuhlayisi wa Vuxokoxoko bya Vumunhu bya Afrika Dzonga, hi lava mpfumelelo wa wena eka leswi landzelaka:
auth.agreeAll: Ndza pfumela eka hinkwaswo leswi nga laha henhla
auth.start: Sungula ku Sirhelela Ndyangu wa Mina

dashboard.needsAttention: Swihlelo swi lava vuhlayisi bya wena
dashboard.recentAlerts: Swihlelo swa Nkarhi lowu Nga hundza
